rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) bears no relation to Educ. Code §29.159, which governs information disclosure by government-funded child-care providers to parents. No subject-matter overlap exists.
quote: each provider of government-funded child-care services shall, at the time that a child is enrolled with the provider, furnish to the child's parent information regarding:
_note: No conflict identified. The rule concerns child-care provider information duties; the proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts. Disparate statutory domains.
